summary: Integration tests for STORY-504 test-folder-write-protection rule created and passing. Anti-gaming validation passed. All component boundaries validated.

observations.note: Step 0 anti-gaming validation PASSED: 0 skip decorators, 0 empty tests, 0 TODO/FIXME placeholders, mock ratio 0/29 (threshold 58)

Integration tests cover 4 integration point categories: (1) CLAUDE.md conditional rules parsing, (2) cross-story references (STORY-502, STORY-503, EPIC-085), (3) operational/source file sync, (4) workflow phase enforcement

CLAUDE.md conditional rules entry for test-folder-protection.md successfully parsed. Entry contains all required path patterns (tests/**, *.test.*, *.spec.*, test_*.py, *_test.py) and appears adjacent to other workflow rules (python-testing.md, typescript-strict.md, api-endpoints.md) with consistent formatting

Rule file successfully references STORY-502 (red-phase test integrity checksums) and STORY-503 (test tampering heuristic patterns) as part of integrated test integrity system under EPIC-085. Thematic alignment verified across all three stories

Operational/Source file synchronization verified. Files have identical content across both locations (src/claude/rules/workflow/ and .claude/rules/workflow/). SHA-256 checksum validation passed, confirming bit-for-bit integrity

Rule enforcement contract documented for all workflow phases (Phase 01-10). Phase-specific behavior explicitly defined: Phase 02 permits test-automator, Phase 05 permits integration-tester, Phase 04 (Refactor) explicitly prevents test modification via HALT. AskUserQuestion protocol fully specified

Test execution results: 33 total tests passing (23 unit + 10 integration). Unit tests validate rule file content and structure. Integration tests validate CLAUDE.md parsing, cross-story references, file sync, and workflow phase enforcement

4 integration test suites with 10 total tests created following AAA (Arrange-Act-Assert) pattern. Tests validate CLAUDE.md syntax, cross-story integration, file sync integrity (SHA-256), and phase-specific enforcement logic. No mocking required (all tests validate actual file content and structure)

No coverage gaps detected. All integration points tested: (1) CLAUDE.md conditional rules entry parsing and formatting, (2) STORY-502/503 cross-references from EPIC-085, (3) src/ and .claude/ file sync validation, (4) phase-specific behavior documentation (Phases 01-10)

Integration tests pass quality checks: no skip decorators (0/10), no empty tests (0/10), no TODO/FIXME placeholders (0/10), mock ratio 0/29 (well below threshold of 58). Test names follow pattern: test_should_{expected}_when_{condition}. Each test has clear Arrange-Act-Assert sections with inline comments

recommendations: Integration tests complete and comprehensive. All component boundaries (CLAUDE.md integration, cross-story references, file sync, workflow enforcement) validated with passing tests
Consider adding performance benchmark tests if rule-loading time becomes critical factor in future framework versions
Cross-story integration (STORY-502, STORY-503, STORY-504) forms cohesive test integrity system per EPIC-085 design
